reason: Dell Latitude 5420 laptop is compatible with Logitech MX Keys wireless keyboard via Bluetooth or USB receiver connection.
Dell Latitude 5420 notebook can pair with Logitech MX Master 3 mouse via USB receiver or Bluetooth connectivity as a standard input peripheral.
Dell Latitude 5420 notebooks typically feature HDMI output ports for connecting external displays via HDMI cables.

Dell Latitude 5420 notebooks feature USB-C ports and can be charged/data-synced with USB-C cables like this Anker 100W cable, though confirmation of exact connector type and power specifications would be ideal.
Dell Latitude 5420 notebooks include DisplayPort video output ports, making a DisplayPort cable a compatible accessory for video display connectivity.
Dell Latitude 5420 notebooks typically feature USB Type-C ports that support video output, making them compatible with Type-C to HDMI dongles for display connectivity.
Dell Latitude 5420 supports USB Type-C charging and the 65W Dell Type-C charger is compatible with this model.
Logitech MX Keys is a wireless keyboard compatible with most laptops including ThinkPad via Bluetooth or USB receiver.
Logitech MX Master3 is a wireless mouse compatible with ThinkPad T14 Gen2 via Bluetooth or USB receiver.
ThinkPad T14 Gen2 laptops typically feature HDMI output ports, making a standard HDMI cable compatible for video display connectivity.
ThinkPad T14 Gen2 has USB-C ports and the Anker USB-C 100W cable is compatible for charging and data transfer.
ThinkPad T14 Gen2 laptops typically feature DisplayPort output via USB-C or dedicated ports, making them compatible with standard DisplayPort cables.
ThinkPad T14 Gen2 has USB Type-C ports that support display output, compatible with the Type-C HDMI dongle for external display connectivity.
Logitech MX Keys is a Bluetooth/wireless keyboard that is compatible with Apple MacBook Air M2 via standard wireless connectivity.
Logitech MX Master 3 is a wireless/Bluetooth mouse that is universally compatible with macOS devices including the Apple MacBook Air M2.
Apple MacBook Air M2 13" has HDMI output capabilities and can connect to HDMI cables for external display connections.
Apple MacBook Air M2 13" has USB-C ports and the Anker USB-C cable is compatible for charging and data transfer.
Apple MacBook Air M2 13" supports Thunderbolt 3/4 which is compatible with DisplayPort cables for video output.
Apple MacBook Air M2 includes USB-C ports that are compatible with Type C HDMI dongles for video output.
LG 27UL500-W 27 inch 4K monitors typically feature HDMI inputs and can be connected with standard HDMI cables for video transmission.
The LG 27UL500-W monitor supports USB-C connectivity for both video and power delivery, making the Anker USB-C cable compatible for data and charging applications.
The LG 27UL500-W 4K monitor typically supports DisplayPort connectivity, making a 6ft DisplayPort cable a compatible audio/video cable option.
A Type C to HDMI dongle can connect to devices with USB-C ports to output video to the monitor's HDMI input, though the monitor specs are not detailed enough to confirm full compatibility.
Samsung LC32F391 32-inch curved monitor has HDMI inputs and a 2-meter HDMI cable is a standard compatible connection for video signal transmission.
Samsung LC32F391 monitors typically feature DisplayPort connectivity, allowing the DisplayPort cable to connect the monitor to a compatible source device.
The Samsung LC32F391 monitor accepts HDMI input and the USB-C to HDMI dongle enables connection from USB-C devices, making them compatible for video display.
Both Logitech MX products use the same 2.4GHz wireless protocol and can pair with a single Unifying receiver or connect via Bluetooth to the same computer.
An HDMI cable can connect to a Type C HDMI dongle's output port to transmit video/audio signals.
USB-C cable can physically connect to Type C HDMI dongle to enable video output from USB-C devices.
